title: NEW AI SEO Agent is INSANE!
summary: Julian Goldie promotes a new AI SEO agent designed for automating search engine optimization tasks. The agent is positioned as a powerful tool integrated with Agent OS and promoted through his AI Profit Lab community.
writeup: The video promotes a new AI agent built to automate search engine optimization tasks, positioned by Julian Goldie as integrated with Agent OS. It matters as an example of applying AI agents to a specific marketing workflow rather than general assistance. Key takeaways: the agent targets SEO automation, ties into the Agent OS framework, and is promoted through Goldie's AI Profit Lab community.
